prompt.content:
Using the organizational hierarchy file (Organizational Hierarchy File.xlsx), the job title reference architecture (Job Title Reference Architecture.xlsx), the attached performance & salary data of all the employees, role mapping, and the market benchmark data, identify how many employees have a Compa-Ratio below 0.85 (severely underpaid) AND a Performance Rating of 4 or 5.

Please provide your answers directly in the console.

rubrics.name: States that the number of employees have both a Compa-Ratio below 0.85... (ver_6197563d0a174c9abf6713feedb0ff19)

messages.content: States that the number of employees have both a Compa-Ratio below 0.85 (severely underpaid) and a Performance Rating of 4 or 5 is 35.

golden_responses.golden_text_response: The number of employees that have both a Compa-Ratio below 0.85 (severely underpaid) and a Performance Rating of 4 or 5 is 35.
